justification: The diff correctly upgrades Spring Boot 2.5.6 to 3.3.13 and Java 17 to 21, migrating javax to jakarta namespaces and replacing deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans. It uses Java 21 features like text blocks and List.getFirst(), but introduces spurious churn by removing the spring-boot-starter-test dependency (which is needed for tests) and removing the 'user' account from security config, which changes application behavior beyond migration.
